title: IIT Guwahati MTech Admission 2026 – Overview

detail.title: IIT Guwahati MTech Admission 2026 – Overview
detail.short_info: IIT Guwahati PG Admission 2026 for MTech is open. Get full details on eligibility, application process, fees, and apply link.

content.text: IIT Guwahati MTech Admission 2026 is conducted through GATE 2026 scores followed by COAP counselling for final seat allocation. The Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) invites applications for M.Tech programmes for the academic session 2026–27.

Candidates must apply online through the official admission portal, meet eligibility criteria, and participate in COAP (Common Offer Acceptance Portal) rounds to secure admission. IIT Guwahati is one of India’s leading IITs, known for its modern infrastructure, research excellence, and strong placement record. This article provides complete details on IIT Guwahati MTech Admission 2026 including eligibility criteria, courses, application process, fees, selection procedure, important dates, and direct apply links.

rows: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)

content.text: The Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) releases M.Tech admission notifications every year for the July session. For 2026–27, admission is based on GATE scores and COAP counselling. Candidates must regularly check the official website for updates regarding application forms and selection rounds.
Direct Link to Open IIT Guwahati MTech Admission 2026 Notification: Click Here
Candidates must have a four-year Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology or equivalent with at least 60% marks or 6.0 CPI. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}
A relaxation of 5% marks or 0.5 CPI is provided for SC/ST/PwD candidates. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}
A valid GATE score is mandatory for admission to most M.Tech programmes. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}
Departments may impose additional requirements such as relevant discipline background or higher cutoff scores.

sections.heading: IIT Guwahati MTech Admission Process 2026 (GATE + COAP)

content.text: COAP is a centralized platform where candidates accept admission offers from IITs. :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}
Apply Online: Visit the official IIT Guwahati portal

links.text: Visit the official IIT Guwahati portal

content.text: The application fee is non-refundable.
Some departments conduct written tests followed by interviews. :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}
These dates are based on official admission timelines and GATE schedule. :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}
Additional one-time admission fees may also apply as per institute rules. :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6}
